description:
Highlights

  • Built-in 48pcs SMD4014 LEDs (0.2W/PC)
  • Featured with 4800 lumens brightness and 7500K cold white light
  • Offers ultra-long lifespan up to 5760hrs which is equal to 3.2 years based on 5-hrs daily use.
  • Widely used in both residential and commercial grid ceilings
  • Note: This LED panel light only fit for t-grid recessed grid ceiling mounting, not suitable for suspension or surface mounting

Specification

  • United States

Details

*Features*:

**Ultra-Bright and Energy-Saving*:Built-in 48pcs SMD4014 LEDs(0.2W/PC),our LED panel light offers total 48W excellent lighting effect equivalent to 150W traditional fluorescent fixtures,saves up to 70% on electricity bill.
** Uniform and Smooth Light Distribution*:Featured with 4800 lumens brightness and 7500K cold white light. Delivers uniform and smooth lighting,no flicker,no buzz and no dark spots during the whole service life.
** Up to 3.2 Years Long Lifespan*:Designed with solid construction,made of premium aluminum alloy and PP material. Our panel light offers ultra-long lifespan up to 5760hrs which is equal to 3.2 years based on 5-hrs daily use.
** Easy Installation*:Standard size makes it an awesome replacement for a 2×2FT fluorescent troffer fixture,easy to install with included user instruction. Note:This LED panel light only fit for t-grid recessed grid ceiling mounting,not suitable for suspension or surface mounting.
** Wide Application*:Standard 2×2FT LED panel light widely used in both residential and commercial grid ceilings. A practical illuminating light for home,office,schools,gym,hospital and other commercial application.
*Specifications*:

Product Type: 2Pcs LED Panel Light
Material: Aluminum, PP
Input Voltage: 110v-260v, 50/60Hz
Power: 48W
Luminous Flux: 4800LM
LED Quantity: 48Pcs*SMD4014 LEDs
Color Temperature: 6000K-7500K Cold White
Lighting Angle: 110°
Dimmable: Not Supported
Lifespan: 5760hrs
Per Item Size (L*W*H): 23.62*23.62*0.55in/60*60*1.4cm
Per Item Weight: 3.59lbs/1631g
2Packs Package Size (L*W*H): 62x62x3cm/24.41x24.41x1.19inches
2Packs Package Weight (L*W*H):3.9kg/8.6lbs
*Package Lists*:

2 * LED Panel Lights
1 * User Manual
